# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a simple GitHub Actions workflow for our application CI. On every push, install dependencies, run unit tests, build the application, and deploy to our staging environment. Focus on speed - we want fast feedback for developers. We'll add security scanning later.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
      - 'feature/**'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  NODE_ENV: test
  CI: true

jobs:
  install:
    name: Install Dependencies
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Cache node_modules
        id: cache-node-modules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: node_modules
          key: node-modules-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            node-modules-

      - name: Install dependencies
        if: steps.cache-node-modules.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund

  test:
    name: Run Unit Tests
    needs: install
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: node_modules
          key: node-modules-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: npm test -- --ci --coverage --maxWorkers=2

      - name: Upload test coverage
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-report
          path: coverage/
          retention-days: 7

  build:
    name: Build Application
    needs: install
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: node_modules
          key: node-modules-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 3

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    needs:
      - test
      - build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.ref == 'refs/heads/develop'
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: ${{ vars.STAGING_URL }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: dist/

      - name: Configure deployment credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          aws-access-key-id: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
          aws-secret-access-key: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
          aws-region: ${{ vars.AWS_REGION || 'us-east-1' }}

      - name: Deploy to staging
        run: |
          aws s3 sync dist/ s3://${{ vars.STAGING_S3_BUCKET }} \
            --delete \
            --cache-control "public, max-age=31536000, immutable" \
            --exclude "index.html" \
            --exclude "service-worker.js"

          aws s3 cp dist/index.html s3://${{ vars.STAGING_S3_BUCKET }}/index.html \
            --cache-control "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate"

      - name: Invalidate CloudFront cache
        if: vars.STAGING_CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID != ''
        run: |
          aws cloudfront create-invalidation \
            --distribution-id ${{ vars.STAGING_CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID }} \
            --paths "/*"

      - name: Verify deployment
        run: |
          echo "Waiting for deployment to propagate..."
          sleep 10
          STAGING_URL="${{ vars.STAGING_URL }}"
          HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$STAGING_URL")
          if [ "$HTTP_STATUS" -ne 200 ]; then
            echo "Deployment verification failed with HTTP status $HTTP_STATUS"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Deployment verified successfully (HTTP $HTTP_STATUS)"

      - name: Post deployment summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "## Staging Deployment Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Branch:** ${{ github.ref_name }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Commit:** ${{ github.sha }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Staging URL:** ${{ vars.STAGING_URL }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Status:** ${{ job.status }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
